creator: unixjake@protonmail.com
text:
Created attachment 184246
Diff from 7.0.03 to 10.0.04.

This is my first attempt at updating a port.  I have updated gnu-unifont from version 7.0.03 to 10.0.04.  portlint recommended adding a LICENSE statement to the Makefile, so I have done.  I did not include a copy of the license itself.
